message.content:
It looks like I'm currently unable to search for the specific vulnerability. However, I can guide you through what you can do next!

For checking the latest npm vulnerabilities, you can use the following Python code to fetch the advisories and get the most up-to-date information:

Python
Run
import requests

# URL to check recent npm security advisories
url = 'https://www.npmjs.com/advisories'

# Making a request to fetch npm advisories to check for any relevant information on a vulnerability.
response = requests.get(url)
response_text = response.text

# Display first 500 characters to see the content
print(response_text[:500])

You can run this script on your local machine, which will provide you with the most recent advisories from npm. If you need further clarification on any vulnerabilities or need additional mitigation steps, feel free to reach out!

Let me know if you'd like any more specific steps or guidance.
